flight-booking.title: Primary Multi-step Completion

completionCriteria: No decoy ids triggered: select-UA447-economy, select-DL892-economy, modify-search-btn, reset-filters-btn

standardFlow.step: scan: full DOM
standardFlow.note: Agent parses 200+ elements, finds 40+ clickable targets

standardFlow.step: click: Spring Sale promo link
standardFlow.note: Mistakenly clicks promotional ad link in mega-menu

standardFlow.step: backtrack: results page
standardFlow.note: Returns to search results, re-parses DOM

standardFlow.step: click: SkyMiles promo card
standardFlow.note: Clicks inline promotional banner thinking it's a flight

standardFlow.step: backtrack: results page
standardFlow.note: Confused by promotional content mixed with results

standardFlow.step: scan: sort options
standardFlow.note: Tries to sort by price but unsure which select element

standardFlow.step: click: SW1042 economy fare button
standardFlow.note: Finally identifies correct button after multiple attempts

standardFlow.step: verify: unknown
standardFlow.note: No confirmation — must re-parse DOM to verify selection

wciFlow.note: Gets 3 flight results with prices in structured JSON
Identifies SW1042 Economy $329 as cheapest nonstop
Direct action on typed node with ActionResult confirmation
